_meta.purpose: SQL query patterns for Qwen Coder 14B — ready-to-use PostgreSQL templates for all common collection portfolio questions.
sql_rules: Always use double quotes for column names with spaces: "op_bucket", "cust_id", "bounce_status"
Always use COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") for customer-level metrics — NEVER plain COUNT
Use NULLIF(denominator, 0) to avoid division by zero
Use ROUND(..., 2) for percentage and ratio fields
Use ILIKE for case-insensitive string filters if needed
Date column is "next_date" — filter using = '2026-02-01' format (ISO YYYY-MM-DD)
NULL values: use IS NULL / IS NOT NULL. See null_handling in business_logic.json
Use GROUP BY for aggregations across categories
Use ORDER BY at end of grouped queries

bounce_count.description: Count of customers who bounced (Tech or Non Tech)
bounce_count.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") AS "Bounce Count"
FROM loan_dashboard
WHERE "bounce_status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech')

bounce_count_with_branch_filter.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") AS "Bounce Count"
FROM loan_dashboard
WHERE "bounce_status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech')
  AND "branch" = '{BRANCH_VALUE}'

bounce_percent.description: Bounce rate as percentage of total customers
bounce_percent.sql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "bounce_status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech') THEN "cust_id" END) * 100.0
  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id"), 0),
2) AS "Bounce %"
FROM loan_dashboard

bounce_by_branch.description: Bounce count and rate grouped by branch
bounce_by_branch.sql:
SELECT
  "branch",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "bounce_status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech') THEN "cust_id" END) AS "Bounce Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") AS "Total Customers",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "bounce_status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech') THEN "cust_id" END) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id"), 0),
  2) AS "Bounce %"
FROM loan_dashboard
GROUP BY "branch"
ORDER BY "Bounce Count" DESC

bounce_by_region.description: Bounce count and rate grouped by region
bounce_by_region.sql:
SELECT
  "region",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "bounce_status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech') THEN "cust_id" END) AS "Bounce Count",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "bounce_status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech') THEN "cust_id" END) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id"), 0),
  2) AS "Bounce %"
FROM loan_dashboard
GROUP BY "region"
ORDER BY "Bounce Count" DESC

bounce_tech_vs_nontech_by_branch.description: Bounce count split by Tech vs Non Tech per branch
bounce_tech_vs_nontech_by_branch.sql:
SELECT
  "branch",
  "bounce_status",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") AS "Count"
FROM loan_dashboard
WHERE "bounce_status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech')
GROUP BY "branch", "bounce_status"
ORDER BY "branch", "Count" DESC

resolution_count.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") AS "Resolution Count"
FROM loan_dashboard
WHERE "cust_wise_status" = 'Norm'

resolution_percent.sql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "cust_wise_status" = 'Norm' THEN "cust_id" END) * 100.0
  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id"), 0),
2) AS "Resolution %"
FROM loan_dashboard

resolution_by_branch.sql:
SELECT
  "branch",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "cust_wise_status" = 'Norm' THEN "cust_id" END) AS "Resolved Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") AS "Total Customers",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "cust_wise_status" = 'Norm' THEN "cust_id" END) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id"), 0),
  2) AS "Resolution %"
FROM loan_dashboard
GROUP BY "branch"
ORDER BY "Resolution %" DESC

bucket_distribution.description: Count and outstanding by Op bucket
bucket_distribution.sql:
SELECT
  "op_bucket",
  COUNT(loanappno) AS "Loan Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") AS "Customer Count",
  SUM(bal_prin) AS "Balance Principal",
  SUM("tod") AS "Total Overdue"
FROM loan_dashboard
GROUP BY "op_bucket"
ORDER BY "Loan Count" DESC

bucket_movement_matrix.description: Opening bucket vs Closing bucket movement matrix
bucket_movement_matrix.sql:
SELECT
  "op_bucket",
  "closing_bucket",
  COUNT(loanappno) AS "Loan Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") AS "Customer Count"
FROM loan_dashboard
GROUP BY "op_bucket", "closing_bucket"
ORDER BY "op_bucket", "closing_bucket"

cust_wise_status_summary.sql:
SELECT
  "cust_wise_status",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") AS "Customer Count",
  COUNT(loanappno) AS "Loan Count"
FROM loan_dashboard
GROUP BY "cust_wise_status"
ORDER BY "Customer Count" DESC

coverage_percent.description: Coverage % — visited allocated customers vs all allocated
coverage_percent.sql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "visit_or_not" = 'Visited' AND "allocated_or_not" = 'Allocated' THEN "cust_id" END) * 100.0
  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "allocated_or_not" = 'Allocated' THEN "cust_id" END), 0),
2) AS "Coverage %"
FROM loan_dashboard

coverage_by_tl.sql:
SELECT
  "tl",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "visit_or_not" = 'Visited' AND "allocated_or_not" = 'Allocated' THEN "cust_id" END) AS "Visited Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "allocated_or_not" = 'Allocated' THEN "cust_id" END) AS "Allocated Count",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "visit_or_not" = 'Visited' AND "allocated_or_not" = 'Allocated' THEN "cust_id" END) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "allocated_or_not" = 'Allocated' THEN "cust_id" END), 0),
  2) AS "Coverage %"
FROM loan_dashboard
WHERE "tl" <> 'No TL'
GROUP BY "tl"
ORDER BY "Coverage %" DESC

visit_intensity_by_bucket.description: Average visit intensity by Op bucket
visit_intensity_by_bucket.sql:
SELECT
  "op_bucket",
  ROUND(SUM("visit_count")::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id"), 0), 2) AS "Avg Visits per Customer",
  SUM("visit_count") AS "Total Visits",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") AS "Customer Count"
FROM loan_dashboard
GROUP BY "op_bucket"
ORDER BY "op_bucket"

npa_by_region.sql:
SELECT
  "region",
  COUNT(loanappno) AS "NPA Loan Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") AS "NPA Customer Count",
  SUM(bal_prin) AS "NPA Outstanding"
FROM loan_dashboard
WHERE "op_bucket" = 'NPA'
GROUP BY "region"
ORDER BY "NPA Loan Count" DESC

add_npa_by_region.description: New NPA additions (Add NPA = 1) by region
add_npa_by_region.sql:
SELECT
  "region",
  COUNT(loanappno) AS "New NPA Count"
FROM loan_dashboard
WHERE "add_npa" = 1
GROUP BY "region"
ORDER BY "New NPA Count" DESC

portfolio_outstanding_by_bucket.description: Total bal_prin and TOD by Op bucket
portfolio_outstanding_by_bucket.sql:
SELECT
  "op_bucket",
  SUM(bal_prin) AS "Balance Principal",
  SUM("tod") AS "Total Overdue",
  COUNT(loanappno) AS "Loan Count"
FROM loan_dashboard
GROUP BY "op_bucket"
ORDER BY "Balance Principal" DESC

digital_cash_by_mob.description: Payment channel (Digital vs Cash) by MOB bucket
digital_cash_by_mob.sql:
SELECT
  "mob_bucket",
  "digital_cash",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id") AS "Customer Count"
FROM loan_dashboard
WHERE "digital_cash" IS NOT NULL AND "digital_cash" <> ''
GROUP BY "mob_bucket", "digital_cash"
ORDER BY "mob_bucket"

dpd_distribution.sql:
SELECT
  dpd_casewise,
  "op_bucket",
  "branch",
  "region"
FROM loan_dashboard
WHERE dpd_casewise IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY dpd_casewise

fe_scorecard.sql:
SELECT
  "allocation_1",
  "tl",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "cust_wise_status" = 'Norm' THEN "cust_id" END) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id"), 0), 2) AS "Resolution %",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "visit_or_not" = 'Visited' AND "allocated_or_not" = 'Allocated' THEN "cust_id" END) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "allocated_or_not" = 'Allocated' THEN "cust_id" END), 0), 2) AS "Coverage %",
  ROUND(SUM("visit_count")::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "cust_id"), 0), 2) AS "Intensity",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "allocated_or_not" = 'Allocated' THEN "cust_id" END) AS "Allocated Count"
FROM loan_dashboard
WHERE "allocation_1" <> 'NA'
GROUP BY "allocation_1", "tl"
ORDER BY "Resolution %" DESC

filter_snippets._note: Append these to WHERE clause or AND conditions in any SQL query
